title: Everything your SaaS needs — already built.
text: Focus on your product, not infrastructure.
foot: These are the features most SaaS teams spend months building, with Lesli they are ready on day one.

content.name: Modular Architecture
content.text: Extend the platform with plug-and-play modules to build exactly the system you need.

content.name: Flexible Authentication Methods
content.text: Allow users to sign in using passwords, one-time codes, or magic links.

content.name: Detailed User Privileges
content.text: Control exactly what each user can see and do with fine-grained permissions.

content.name: System Auditing
content.text: Track important user and system actions for security, compliance, and transparency.

content.name: Activities
content.text: See a clear timeline of user actions and system events.

content.name: Versions
content.text: Track changes and restore previous versions of important data.

content.name: Attachments
content.text: Upload and manage files directly within any resource across the platform.

content.name: Full-text Search
content.text: Find data instantly using powerful global and contextual search.

content.name: Multilanguage
content.text: Support multiple languages and translate both the core system and custom modules.

content.name: Theming
content.text: Customize the look and feel of the platform across web, desktop, and mobile.

content.name: Public Link Sharing
content.text: Share content with external users using secure links, passwords, and expiry dates.

content.name: Command Interface
content.text: Interact with the system through commands, chat, or voice for faster workflows.
